title: DSPT AI on Tap #5 @ Cerveja Canil
description:
**🍻 Data Science Portugal presents: DSPT AI on Tap back in Lisbon**

We’re bringing AI on Tap back to Lisbon. No slides. No talks. Just great people, casual conversation, and craft beer. If you work with AI, study it, build products, do research, or you’re simply curious, you’re welcome. Digital nomads, students, corporate AI folks, founders, and newcomers all fit right in.

**Conversation starter: bring 1 thing to share**

To make it easy to meet people, we invite everyone to bring one small “conversation seed”. Any of these works:

* 📌 A question you’re currently stuck on
* 🧠 A concept you finally understood
* 🧪 A mini experiment you tried
* 🛠️ A tool, workflow, or prompt pattern you’re using
* 📰 A recent paper, blog post, or demo you found interesting
* 💼 A real-world use case you’re exploring at work or school

You can keep it short, 30 to 60 seconds is perfect.

**What to expect**

* 🍺 Great craft beer and relaxed community vibes
* 🤝 Easy networking, no awkward forced intros
* 💬 Small groups, practical chats, and lots of shared learning
* 🌍 A diverse crowd: newcomers and experienced folks

📅 **When:** June 24
🕓 **Time:** 5:45 PM
📌 **Location:** Cerveja Canil

Bring your curiosity, grab a drink, and come share your top pick of the year. 🍻

**RSVP now!**

title: DSPT x TensorOps: Programmatic Advertising in the Age of AI
description:
**Lisbon, let’s talk about ads 🤑🤖✨**Ever wonder how the digital ads you see are chosen in mere milliseconds? Behind every screen, complex AI and algorithms is quietly powering the internet's economy.

**[Data Science Portugal](https://www.linkedin.com/company/11336688/admin/page-posts/published/?share=true#) × [TensorOps](tensorops.ai)** are teaming up for **“Beyond the Click: Programmatic Advertising in the Age of AI.”**

The era of basic bidding is behind us. Machine learning, generative models, and predictive analytics are completely rewriting the rules of audience targeting, yield optimization, and campaign generation. Whether you're building the algorithms yourself or just curious about the tech shaping digital advertising on the web, this is where you need to be.

Join us for an exclusive, unfiltered **roundtable including top leaders from the advertising and publishing industry**. We’ll be decoding the algorithms driving the next generation of ads, followed by high-level **networking 🧠🤝** with Lisbon's top data scientists, ML engineers, and AdTech innovators.

📍**In-person:** Lisbon Location TBA
**🗓️ Agenda and Speakers:** TBA

**See you soon 👋**

title: DSPT x Devoteam: AI Agents on the Run
description:
🌸 **Lisbon**, let's talk AI Agents! 🤖✨ **DSPT - Data Science Portugal** is thrilled to kick off the **Primavera AI Fest**, an exclusive four-part series bringing together the brightest minds in the local AI tech community.

***Check out the full Primavera AI Fest agenda [here](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7449770982128381955/)***

For our very first event, we are teaming up with **Devoteam**, who will be hosting us at their Lisbon offices. Expect an evening packed with deep-dive technical sessions featuring experts from **Devoteam** and **QuintoAndar**, followed by high-level networking, food, and drinks.
Whether you're building GenAI pipelines or figuring out how to push agents to production, this is where you need to be.

***

### 🎙️ The Sessions

**Talk 1: Preserving History with AI: A RAG Journey Through 100+ Years of Football Archives** *By Rita Ribeiro (Devoteam)* How do you make a century of history instantly searchable? Rita will dive into a real-world Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) project developed by Devoteam for a major football club museum. Discover how they tackled the challenge of analyzing and surfacing insights from over 100 years of historical archives.

**Talk 2: Evaluating AI Agents at QuintoAndar** *By Lucas Cardoso & Rodolfo Abreu (QuintoAndar)* Still relying on "vibe checks" to see if your AI agents actually work? Stop guessing and start measuring. Dive into QuintoAndar's framework for evaluating AI agents—covering everything from golden datasets and the role of evals from experimentation to production. Learn how to turn GenAI unpredictability into reliable, production-ready performance.

***

### 🗓️ The Agenda

* **17:30** — 🚪 Reception & Check-in
* **18:00** — 👋 Welcoming by DSPT
* **18:10** — ⚽ *Session 1:* Preserving History with AI by Rita Ribeiro, Devoteam
* **18:30** — 📈 *Session 2:* Evaluating AI Agent by Lucas Cardoso & Rodolfo Abreu, QuintoAndar
* **18:50** — 🎤 Q&A
* **19:15** — 🍻 Networking, Drinks & Bites

***

### 📍 The Details

* **When:** April 29 at 5:30 PM
* **Where:** Devoteam Lisbon Office

Space is limited, so secure your spot, bring your curiosity, and let’s talk AI. See you there! 👋
